enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Credit
Cards and Debit Cards: Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Credit Cards and Debit Cards: Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
enriched_requirements.object: Rural Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions cover the general and conduct regulations relating to credit, debit and
co-branded cards which shall be read along with prudential, payment and technology &
cyber security related directions applicable to credit, debit and co-branded cards, as
issued by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: prudential, payment and technology & cyber security related directions applicable to credit, debit and co-branded cards, as issued

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall bear the
meanings assigned to them below:
(1) Add-on Credit Card means a supplementary credit card to the principal or primary
credit card, issued to person/s with predefined relationship with the primary
cardholder, within the credit limits and liability of the latter, subject to such terms and
conditions as stipulated by the card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) Add-on Credit Card means a supplementary credit card to the principal or primary credit card, issued to person/s with predefined relationship with the primary cardholder, within the credit limits and liability of the latter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(14) Debit Card is a physical or virtual payment instrument containing a means of
identification, linked to a Savings Bank / Current Account which can be used to
<image>
withdraw cash, make online payments, do PoS terminal/Quick Response (QR) code
transactions, fund transfer, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: a Savings Bank / Current Account which can be used to <image> withdraw cash, make online payments, do PoS terminal/Quick

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(20) Principal Cardholder means the customer who has been issued credit card by a
card-issuer and on whose name the card account has been opened.
enriched_requirements.object: been issued credit card by a card-issuer and on whose name the card account has been opened

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the issuance of a credit card for renewal or replacement shall not be
treated as an unsolicited card.
enriched_requirements.object: unsolicited card

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(23) Upgradation of Credit Card means enhancement in the benefits and features of
credit cards issued, for example, an increase in the credit or cash limit of the card.
enriched_requirements.object: and features of credit cards issued, for example, an increase in the credit or cash limit of the card

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory mod

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Each card-issuer shall have a well-documented Board approved policy for the issuance
and conduct of credit cards.
enriched_requirements.object: approved policy for the issuance and conduct of credit cards

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board approved policy shall be in consonance with
various instructions on the subject issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time, as well
as these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: various instructions on the subject issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time, as well as these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board approved policy shall be available on the website of the
card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: website of the card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy should, inter alia, cover the following aspects:
(1) Interest rate ceiling and other charges.
enriched_requirements.object: the following aspects: (1) Interest rate ceiling and other charges

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall put in place a mechanism for review of their credit card operations on
half-yearly basis by the Audit Committee of the Board of Directors.
enriched_requirements.object: mechanism for review of their credit card operations on half-yearly basis by the Audit Committee of the Board of Directors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The review shall
include, inter-alia, customer service, frauds, complaints and grievance redressal, card
usage analysis including cards not used for long durations and the inherent risks therein.
enriched_requirements.object: frauds, complaints and grievance redressal, card usage analysis including cards not used for long durations and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Customer Acquisition:
(1) Card-issuers shall provide a one-page Key Fact Statement along with the credit card
application containing the important aspects of the card such as rate of interest,
quantum of charges, among others.
enriched_requirements.object: Fact Statement along with the credit card application containing the important aspects of the card such as rate of interest, qu

conditions: In case of rejection of a credit card application
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of rejection of a credit card application, the
card-issuer shall convey in writing the specific reason/s which led to the rejection of the
application.
enriched_requirements.object: specific reason/s which led to the rejection of the application

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The MITC as given in Chapter VII of these Directions, shall be highlighted and published
/ sent separately to the customers, at the acceptance stage (welcome kit) and in
important subsequent communications.
enriched_requirements.object: / sent separately to the customers, at the acceptance stage (welcome kit) and in important subsequent communications

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The MITC shall be provided to the customer
(preferably in English, Hindi and the local language) at the time of onboarding and each
time, a condition is modified with notice to the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: customer (preferably in English, Hindi and the local language) at the time of onboarding and each time, a condition is modified wit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The MITC and copy of the
agreement signed/digitally signed between the card-issuer and cardholder shall be sent
to the registered email address of the cardholder or postal address as per the choice of
the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: registered email address of the cardholder or postal address as per the choice of the customer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Card-issuers may consider introducing, at the option of the customers, an insurance
cover to take care of the liabilities arising out of lost cards, card frauds, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: option of the customers, an insurance cover to take care of the liabilities arising out of lost cards, card frauds, etc

conditions: where the card-issuers are offering any insurance cover to their cardholders
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases
where the card-issuers are offering any insurance cover to their cardholders, in tie-up
with insurance companies, the card-issuers shall obtain explicit consent in writing or in
digital mode from the cardholders along with the details of nominee/s.
enriched_requirements.object: writing or in digital mode from the cardholders along with the details of nominee/s

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case, an unsolicited
card is issued / existing card upgraded and activated without the explicit consent of the
recipient and the latter is billed for the same, the card-issuer shall not only reverse the
charges forthwith, but also pay a penalty without demur to the recipient amounting to
twice the value of the charges reversed.
enriched_requirements.object: forthwith, but also pay a penalty without demur to the recipient amounting to twice the value of the charges reversed

conditions: In case a customer receives an unsolicited card
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: In case a customer receives an unsolicited card, he / she should refrain
from activating or providing consent for activation of card through OTP or any other
Explanation: (i) Customer-initiated process indicating intent to use a credit card such as
PIN generation, modification of transaction control, Interactive Voice Response,
recorded call to the customer care centre and SMS may be considered as activation of
Credit Card.
enriched_requirements.object: of Credit Card

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Underwriting Standards:
(1) Card-issuers shall ensure prudence while issuing credit cards and independently
assess the credit risk while issuing cards to persons, taking into account independent
financial means of applicants.
enriched_requirements.object: credit cards and independently assess the credit risk while issuing cards to persons, taking into account independent fi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) As holding several credit cards enhances the total credit available to any consumer,
card-issuers shall assess the credit limit for a credit card customer taking into
consideration all the limits enjoyed by the cardholder from other entities on the basis of
self-declaration / credit information obtained from a Credit Information Company, as
appropriate.
enriched_requirements.object: for a credit card customer taking into consideration all the limits enjoyed by the cardholder from other entities on the basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This shall be uniformly applied as per the board approved policy of the
card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: per the board approved policy of the card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Card-issuers shall ensure complete transparency in the conversion of credit card
transactions to Equated Monthly Instalments (EMIs) by clearly indicating the principal,
interest and upfront discount provided by the merchant / card-issuer (to make it no cost),
<image>
prior to the conversion.
enriched_requirements.object: the conversion of credit card transactions to Equated Monthly Instalments (EMIs) by clearly indicating the principal,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The same shall also be separately indicated in the credit card
bill / statement.
enriched_requirements.object: in the credit card bill / statement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
EMI conversion with interest component shall not be camouflaged as
zero-interest / no-cost EMI.
enriched_requirements.object: / no-cost EMI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Card-issuers shall ensure that loans offered through credit cards are in compliance with
the instructions on loans and advances issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: through credit cards are in compliance with the instructions on loans and advances issued by the Reserve Bank from time to t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Card-issuers shall ensure that the credit limit as sanctioned and advised to the
cardholder is not breached at any point in time without seeking explicit consent from
the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: limit as sanctioned and advised to the cardholder is not breached at any point in time without seeking explicit consent from th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a cardholder shall be given an option to enable or disable the option of overlimit
through transaction control mechanism available on card-issuer's platforms such as
internet, mobile banking, or any other suitable medium.
enriched_requirements.object: to enable or disable the option of overlimit through transaction control mechanism available on card-issuer's platforms such as int

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers may issue credit cards / charge cards to individuals for personal use together
with add-on cards wherever required.
enriched_requirements.object: charge cards to individuals for personal use together with add-on cards wherever required

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers may also issue cards linked to overdraft accounts that are in the nature of
personal loans without any end-use restrictions subject to the conditions as stipulated in
the overdraft account.
enriched_requirements.object: to overdraft accounts that are in the nature of personal loans without any end-use restrictions subject to the conditions as s

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms of usage of this
credit card (interest charged, repayment schedule, penalty, cash withdrawal limit etc.,)
shall correspond to the terms and conditions applicable to the overdraft facility.
enriched_requirements.object: and conditions applicable to the overdraft facility

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers may issue business credit cards to business entities / individuals for
business expenses.
enriched_requirements.object: to business entities / individuals for business expenses

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The business credit cards may also be issued as charge cards,
<image>
corporate credit cards or by linking a credit facility such as overdraft / cash credit provided
for business purpose as per the terms and conditions stipulated for the facility concerned.
enriched_requirements.object: charge cards, <image> corporate credit cards or by linking a credit facility such as overdraft / cash credit provided for business p

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The card-issuers shall put in place effective mechanism to monitor end use of funds.
enriched_requirements.object: mechanism to monitor end use of funds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The liability of the corporate / business entity on account of business cards shall form part
of their total assessed credits for compliance to instructions issued by the Reserve Bank
of India (Regional Rural Banks - Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025 as
well as the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Income Recognition, Asset
Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025, amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: total assessed credits for compliance to instructions issued by the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Concentration Ris

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The add-on cards shall be issued only to the persons specifically identified by the principal
cardholder under both personal and business credit card categories.
enriched_requirements.object: the persons specifically identified by the principal cardholder under both personal and business credit card categories

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Add-on cards shall
be issued with the clear understanding that the liability will be that of the principal
cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: clear understanding that the liability will be that of the principal cardholder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, while issuing corporate credit cards, the responsibilities and
liabilities of the corporate and its employees shall be clearly specified.

The liability of the
corporate / business entity shall form part of its assessed credits.
enriched_requirements.object: assessed credits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The liability for dues shall rest solely with the principal cardholder and not
with the add-on cardholders.
enriched_requirements.object: principal cardholder and not with the add-on cardholders

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, settlement of dues towards international credit card
shall also be governed as per FEMA regulations.
enriched_requirements.object: per FEMA regulations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the responsibility for making
payments in case of business credit cards shall be governed by the terms and conditions
agreed upon.
enriched_requirements.object: terms and conditions agreed upon

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any request for closure of a credit card shall be honoured within seven working days by
the credit card-issuer, subject to payment of all dues by the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: working days by the credit card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Subsequent to
the closure of credit card, the cardholder shall be immediately notified about the closure
through email, SMS, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: the closure through email, SMS, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Cardholders shall be provided option to submit request for
closure of credit card account through multiple channels such as helpline, dedicated
email-id, Interactive Voice Response (IVR), prominently visible link on the website,
internet banking, mobile-app or any other mode.
enriched_requirements.object: submit request for closure of credit card account through multiple channels such as helpline, dedicated email-id, Interactive Vo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuer shall not insist on
sending a closure request through post or any other means which may result in the delay
of receipt of the request.
enriched_requirements.object: closure request through post or any other means which may result in the delay of receipt of the request

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Failure on the part of the card-issuers to complete the process
of closure within seven working days shall result in a penalty of ₹500 per calendar day of
<image>
delay payable to the cardholder, till the closure of the account provided there is no
outstanding in the account.
enriched_requirements.object: of ₹500 per calendar day of <image> delay payable to the cardholder, till the closure of the account provided there is no outstand

conditions: In case payment towards dues is outstanding
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: In case payment towards dues is outstanding, the card-issuer shall provide
details regarding such outstanding dues to the cardholder upon receipt of the closure
request without waiting for completion of the billing cycle and accordingly advise him / her
to make payment in order to complete the closure process.
enriched_requirements.object: outstanding dues to the cardholder upon receipt of the closure request without waiting for completion of the billing cy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the prescribed
timeline of seven working days shall be calculated after excluding the number of days
taken by the cardholder to clear the outstanding dues.
enriched_requirements.object: the number of days taken by the cardholder to clear the outstanding dues

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuer shall also report to
CICs suitably about the closure of the card account.
enriched_requirements.object: suitably about the closure of the card account

conditions: If a credit card has not been used for a period of more than one year
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If a credit card has not been used for a period of more than one year, the process to close
the card shall be initiated after intimating the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: the cardholder

conditions:
If no reply is received from the
cardholder within a period of 30 days
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If no reply is received from the
cardholder within a period of 30 days, the card account shall be closed by the card-issuer,
subject to payment of all dues by the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The information regarding the closure of
card account shall also accordingly be updated with the Credit Information Company/ies
within a period of 30 days.
enriched_requirements.object: with the Credit Information Company/ies within a period of 30 days

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: In addition to financial transactions, any process initiated by the cardholder
such as generation of statement, change of PIN, change in transaction controls, etc., shall
be considered for treating a card as 'used'.
enriched_requirements.object: a card as 'used'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, any calls made to the customer care
centre, for reasons other than those cited above, shall not be considered towards usage
of a card.
enriched_requirements.object: of a card

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Subsequent to closure of credit card account, any credit balance available in credit card
accounts shall be transferred to the cardholder's bank account.
enriched_requirements.object: cardholder's bank account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall obtain
the details of the cardholder's bank account, if the same is not available with them.
enriched_requirements.object: the cardholder's bank account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks -
Interest Rates on Advances) Directions, 2025 as amended from time to time, while
determining the interest rate on credit card dues.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Interest Rates on Advances) Directions, 2025 as amended from time to time, while determ

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interest charged on credit cards shall be
justifiable having regard to the cost incurred and the extent of return that could be
reasonably expected by the card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: to the cost incurred and the extent of return that could be reasonably expected by the card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall also prescribe an interest rate
ceiling in line with other unsecured loans, including processing and other charges, in
respect of credit cards as part of their Board approved policy.
enriched_requirements.object: rate ceiling in line with other unsecured loans, including processing and other charges, in respect of credit cards as part

conditions:
In case card-issuers charge
interest rates which vary based on the payment/default history of the cardholder
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case card-issuers charge
interest rates which vary based on the payment/default history of the cardholder, there
<image>
shall be transparency in levying such differential interest rates.
enriched_requirements.object: such differential interest rates

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The interest rates as
prescribed in the board approved policy and the rationale for the same shall be auditable.

The card-issuers shall publicise through their website and other means, the interest rates
charged to various categories of customers.
enriched_requirements.object: and other means, the interest rates charged to various categories of customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall indicate upfront to the
credit cardholder, the methodology of calculation of finance charges with illustrative
examples, particularly in situations where only a part of the amount outstanding is paid by
the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: credit cardholder, the methodology of calculation of finance charges with illustrative examples, particularly in situations wh

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the card-issuers shall adhere to the following directions relating to interest rates
and other charges on credit cards:
(1) Card-issuers shall quote Annualized Percentage Rates (APR) on credit cards for
different situations such as retail purchases, balance transfer, cash advances, non-
payment of minimum amount due, late payment etc., if different.
enriched_requirements.object: directions relating to interest rates and other charges on credit cards: (1) Card-issuers shall quote Annualized Percentage Rates (APR) on credit cards for different situations such as retail purchases, balance transfer, cash advances, non- payment of minimum amount due, late payment etc.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The method of
calculation of APR shall be given with clear examples for better comprehension.
enriched_requirements.object: examples for better comprehension

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
APR charged, and the annual fee shall be shown with equal prominence.
enriched_requirements.object: prominence

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The late
payment charges, including the method of calculation of such charges and the number
of days, shall be prominently indicated.

The manner in which the outstanding unpaid
amount has been arrived at for calculation of interest shall also be specifically shown
with prominence in all the billing statements.
enriched_requirements.object: with prominence in all the billing statements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These aspects shall also be shown in the
Welcome Kit in addition to being shown in the billing statements.
enriched_requirements.object: the Welcome Kit in addition to being shown in the billing statements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The terms and conditions for payment of credit card dues, including the minimum
amount due, shall be stipulated so as to ensure there is no negative amortization.
enriched_requirements.object: to ensure there is no negative amortization

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card
-issuers shall not capitalize i.e., levy interest or any other charges, on the unpaid
taxes/levies/charges.

The Minimum Amount Due (MAD) for
the month A shall be calculated in a way that it does not result in negative amortization.
enriched_requirements.object: way that it does not result in negative amortization

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, the MAD shall not be less than ₹250 (indicative figure), so as to avoid
capitalisation of interest or other charges in the subsequent statement.
enriched_requirements.object: (indicative figure), so as to avoid capitalisation of interest or other charges in the subsequent statement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(3) Card-issuers shall inform the cardholders of the implications of paying only 'the
minimum amount due'.
enriched_requirements.object: the implications of paying only 'the minimum amount due'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A legend / warning to the effect that "Making only the minimum
payment every month would result in the repayment stretching over months / years with
consequential compounded interest payment on your outstanding balance" shall be
prominently displayed in all the billing statements to caution the cardholders about the
pitfalls in paying only the minimum amount due.
enriched_requirements.object: all the billing statements to caution the cardholders about the pitfalls in paying only the minimum amount due

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The MITC shall specifically explain that
the 'interest-free credit period' is suspended if any balance of the previous month's bill
is outstanding.
enriched_requirements.object: 'interest-free credit period' is suspended if any balance of the previous month's bill is outstanding

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) For this purpose, card-issuers shall work out illustrative examples and include the same
in the Welcome Kit sent to the cardholders and also place it on their website.
enriched_requirements.object: and include the same in the Welcome Kit sent to the cardholders and also place it on their website

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Card-issuers shall report a credit card account as 'past due' to credit information
companies (CICs) or levy penal charges, viz.
enriched_requirements.object: account as 'past due' to credit information companies (CICs) or levy penal charges, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The number of 'days past due' and late payment charges shall, however, be
computed from the payment due date mentioned in the credit card statement, as
specified under the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Income
Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025 amended from
time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: from the payment due date mentioned in the credit card statement, as specified under the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Late payment charges and other related charges shall be levied, only on
the outstanding amount after the due date, and not on the total amount due.
enriched_requirements.object: the outstanding amount after the due date, and not on the total amount due

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) Interest shall be levied only on the outstanding amount, adjusted for payments / refunds
/ reversed transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: the outstanding amount, adjusted for payments / refunds / reversed transactions

conditions:
In case a cardholder makes partial payment or does not clear the total
amount due within the payment due date
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: In case a cardholder makes partial payment or does not clear the total
amount due within the payment due date, interest free credit period will be lost, and
interest may be levied from the date of transaction on the outstanding amount (adjusted
for payments / refunds / reversed transactions as and when credited) and not on the
total amount due.
enriched_requirements.object: date of transaction on the outstanding amount (adjusted for payments / refunds / reversed transactions as and when credited) and no

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, late payment fee and other charges relating to delay in
payment shall be levied only on the outstanding amount (adjusted for payments /
refunds / reversed transactions as and when credited) after the payment due date and
not on the total amount due.
enriched_requirements.object: the outstanding amount (adjusted for payments / refunds / reversed transactions as and when credited) after the payment due date and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure that there is no delay in sending / dispatching / emailing bills /
statements and the customer has sufficient number of days (at least one fortnight) for
making payment before the interest starts getting charged.
enriched_requirements.object: no delay in sending / dispatching / emailing bills / statements and the customer has sufficient number of days (at least one fort

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In order to obviate frequent
complaints of delayed billing, the card-issuer may consider providing bills and statements
of accounts through internet / mobile banking with the explicit consent of the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: statements of accounts through internet / mobile banking with the explicit consent of the cardholder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall put in place a mechanism to ensure that the cardholder is in receipt of
the billing statement.
enriched_requirements.object: mechanism to ensure that the cardholder is in receipt of the billing statement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Card-issuers shall ensure that wrong bills are not raised and issued to cardholders.
enriched_requirements.object: are not raised and issued to cardholders

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In
case, a cardholder protests any bill, the card-issuer shall provide explanation and,
wherever applicable, documentary evidence shall be provided to the cardholder within a
maximum period of 30 days from the date of complaint.

Card-issuers shall provide the list of payment modes authorised by them for making
payment towards the credit card dues, in their websites and billing statements.
enriched_requirements.object: payment modes authorised by them for making payment towards the credit card dues, in their websites and billing statements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
card-issuers shall advise cardholders to exercise due caution and refrain from making
payments through modes other than those authorised by them.
enriched_requirements.object: due caution and refrain from making payments through modes other than those authorised by them

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
No charges shall be levied on transactions disputed as 'fraud' by the cardholder until the
dispute is resolved.
enriched_requirements.object: disputed as 'fraud' by the cardholder until the dispute is resolved

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any debit to the credit card account shall be done as per the authentication framework
prescribed by the Reserve Bank from time to time, and not through any other mode /
instrument.
enriched_requirements.object: the authentication framework prescribed by the Reserve Bank from time to time, and not through any other mode / instrument

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In order to
provide flexibility in this regard, cardholders shall be provided option to modify the billing
cycle of the credit card at least once, as per cardholders' convenience.
enriched_requirements.object: modify the billing cycle of the credit card at least once, as per cardholders' convenience

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
Explanation: The cardholder shall be provided option to choose any date as the starting
or closing day of the billing cycle at least once.
enriched_requirements.object: choose any date as the starting or closing day of the billing cycle at least once

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, card-issuers may provide the
option to modify the billing cycle through multiple channels such as helpline, dedicated e-
mail-id, Interactive Voice Response (IVR), internet banking, mobile-application and any
other modes.
enriched_requirements.object: modify the billing cycle through multiple channels such as helpline, dedicated e- mail-id, Interactive Voice Response (IVR), int

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any credit amount arising out of refund / failed / reversed transactions or similar
transactions before the due date of payment for which payment has not been made by
the cardholder, shall be immediately adjusted against the 'payment due' and notified to
the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: the 'payment due' and notified to the cardholder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall seek explicit consent of the cardholder to adjust credit amount beyond
a cut-off, one percent of the credit limit or ₹5000, whichever is lower, arising out of refund
/ failed / reversed transactions or similar transactions against the credit limit for which
payment has already been made by the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: the cardholder to adjust credit amount beyond a cut-off, one percent of the credit limit or ₹5000, whichever is lower, arisin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The consent shall be obtained
through e-mail or SMS within seven days of the credit transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: or SMS within seven days of the credit transaction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuers shall
reverse the credit transaction to the cardholder's bank account, if no consent / response
is received from the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: to the cardholder's bank account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding the cut-off, if a cardholder makes a
request to the card-issuer for reversal of the credit amount outstanding in the card account
into his / her bank account, the card-issuer shall do it within three working days from the
receipt of such request.
enriched_requirements.object: working days from the receipt of such request

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The different scenarios for adjustment of credit are
detailed below:
Scenario 1 - Credit of refund / failed / reversed transaction within the same billing
cycle
o Purchase transaction date - October
As bill is yet to be generated in the given case,
the refund amount received on October 19,
15, 2023
2023, shall be adjusted with other debits, prior
o Refund on October 19, 2023 - For
to calculation of the Total Amount Due.
enriched_requirements.object: debits, prior o Refund on October 19, 2023 - For to calculation of the Total Amount Due

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, the
cancellation of purchase dated October
refund amount received on November 04, 2023,
29, 2023
shall be adjusted towards the Total Amount Due
(TAD) and accordingly the cardholder will be
required to pay only the remaining outstanding
(Remaining outstanding = TAD - Refund
amount).
enriched_requirements.object: Total Amount Due (TAD) and accordingly the cardholder will be required to pay only the remaining outstanding (Remaining outsta

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Scenario 3 - Credit of refund / failed / reversed transaction for which payment has
already been made
o Purchase transaction date -
As the cardholder has already cleared the dues,
October 30, 2023
card-issuers shall seek explicit consent of the
o Payment towards dues -
cardholder to adjust the refund amount in line
November 06, 2023
with the provision stipulated at paragraph 31 of
o Refund on November 07, 2023 - For
the MD.
enriched_requirements.object: the o Payment towards dues - cardholder to adjust the refund amount in line November 06, 2023 with the provision stipulated a

conditions:
If the cardholder gives explicit
cancellation of purchase dated October
consent
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
 Case I - If the cardholder gives explicit
cancellation of purchase dated October
consent, then refund amount shall be
30, 2023
adjusted.

conditions:
if the cardholder makes a request for
crediting the refund (transaction for which
payment has already been made)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, if the cardholder makes a request for
crediting the refund (transaction for which
payment has already been made), the same
shall be credited back to the bank account of
the cardholder irrespective of the cut off
defined under paragraph 31.
enriched_requirements.object: the bank account of the cardholder irrespective of the cut off defined under paragraph 31

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
Note: The card-issuers may put in place a suitable mechanism to prevent evergreening of
the credit facility.
enriched_requirements.object: suitable mechanism to prevent evergreening of the credit facility

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For business credit cards wherein the liability rests fully with the corporate or business
entity (principal account holder), timeframe provided for payment of dues and adjustment
of refunds may be as agreed between the card-issuer and the principal account holder.
enriched_requirements.object: the card-issuer and the principal account holder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Unsolicited loans or other credit facilities shall not be offered to the credit cardholders
without seeking explicit consent.
enriched_requirements.object: credit cardholders without seeking explicit consent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case an unsolicited credit facility is extended without
the written / explicit consent of the cardholder and the latter objects to the same, the card-
issuer shall not only withdraw the facility, but also be liable to pay such penalty as may be
considered appropriate by the RBI Ombudsman, if approached.
enriched_requirements.object: but also be liable to pay such penalty as may be considered appropriate by the RBI Ombudsman

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Card-issuers shall not unilaterally upgrade credit cards and enhance credit limits.
enriched_requirements.object: and enhance credit limits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explicit
consent of the cardholder shall invariably be taken whenever there is / are any change/s
in terms and conditions.
enriched_requirements.object: there is / are any change/s in terms and conditions

conditions: In case of reduction in the credit limit
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of reduction in the credit limit, the card-issuer shall
intimate the same to the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: the cardholder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For providing information relating to credit history / repayment record of the cardholder to
a Credit Information Company (that has obtained Certificate of Registration from RBI), the
card-issuer shall explicitly bring to the notice of the customer that such information is being
provided in terms of the Credit Information Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005.
enriched_requirements.object: notice of the customer that such information is being provided in terms of the Credit Information Companies (Regulation) Act,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Before reporting default status of a credit cardholder to a Credit Information Company
(CIC), the card-issuers shall ensure that they adhere to the procedure, approved by their
Board, and intimate the cardholder prior to reporting of the status.
enriched_requirements.object: to the procedure, approved by their Board, and intimate the cardholder prior to reporting of the status

enriched_requirements.timeline: within 30 days from the date of settlement
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the event the
cardholder settles his / her dues after having been reported as defaulter, the card-issuer
shall update the status with CIC within 30 days from the date of settlement.
enriched_requirements.object: CIC within 30 days from the date of settlement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers
shall be particularly careful in the case of cards where there are pending disputes.
enriched_requirements.object: the case of cards where there are pending disputes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
disclosure / release of information, particularly about the default, shall be made only after
the dispute is settled.
enriched_requirements.object: the dispute is settled

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In all cases, a well laid down procedure shall be transparently
followed and be made a part of MITC.
enriched_requirements.object: be made a part of MITC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the matter of recovery of dues, card-issuers shall ensure that they, as also their agents,
adhere to the extant instructions on Fair Practices Code for lenders.
enriched_requirements.object: also their agents, adhere to the extant instructions on Fair Practices Code for lenders

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In particular, with regard to appointment of third-party agencies for debt collection, the
card-issuers shall ensure that their agents refrain from actions that could damage their
integrity and reputation and observe strict customer confidentiality.
enriched_requirements.object: refrain from actions that could damage their integrity and reputation and observe strict customer confidentiality

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All communications
issued by recovery agents must contain the name, email-id, telephone number and
address of the concerned senior officer of the card-issuer whom the customer can contact.
enriched_requirements.object: telephone number and address of the concerned senior officer of the card-issuer whom the customer can contact

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, card-issuers shall provide the name and contact details of the recovery agent to
the cardholder immediately upon assigning the agent to the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: contact details of the recovery agent to the cardholder immediately upon assigning the agent to the cardholder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers / their agents shall not resort to intimidation or harassment of any kind, either
verbal or physical, against any person in their debt collection efforts, including acts
intended to humiliate publicly or intrude upon the privacy of the credit cardholders' family
members, referees and friends, making threatening and anonymous calls or making false
and misleading representations.
enriched_requirements.object: harassment of any kind, either verbal or physical, against any person in their debt collection efforts, including acts inten

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure to comply with the extant guidelines in respect of engagement
of recovery agents issued by the Reserve Bank, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: the extant guidelines in respect of engagement of recovery agents issued by the Reserve Bank, as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The disclosure of customers' information to the DSAs / DMAs / recovery agents shall also
be limited to the extent that will enable them to discharge their duties.
enriched_requirements.object: the extent that will enable them to discharge their duties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Personal information
provided by the cardholder but not required for recovery purposes shall not be released
by the card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuer shall ensure that the DSAs / DMAs / recovery agents
do not transfer or misuse any customer information during marketing of credit card
products.
enriched_requirements.object: / DMAs / recovery agents do not transfer or misuse any customer information during marketing of credit card products

conditions: When card-issuers outsource various credit card related operations
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
When card-issuers outsource various credit card related operations, they shall be
extremely careful that the appointment of such service providers do not compromise the
quality of the customer service and the card-issuers' ability to manage credit, liquidity and
operational risks.
enriched_requirements.object: the appointment of such service providers do not compromise the quality of the customer service and the card-issuers' abilit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the choice of the service provider, the card-issuers shall be guided by
the need to ensure confidentiality of the customer's records, respect customer privacy and
adhere to fair practices in debt collection.
enriched_requirements.object: need to ensure confidentiality of the customer's records, respect customer privacy and adhere to fair practices in debt collection

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall have a system of random checks and mystery shopping to ensure that
their agents have been properly briefed and trained as to how to handle customers and
are also aware of their responsibilities, particularly with regard to soliciting customers,
<image>
hours for calling, privacy of customer information, conveying the correct terms and
conditions of the product on offer.
enriched_requirements.object: random checks and mystery shopping to ensure that their agents have been properly briefed and trained as to how to handle customers a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure that their employees / agents do not indulge in mis-selling of
credit cards by providing incomplete or incorrect information to the customers, prior to the
issuance of a credit card.
enriched_requirements.object: / agents do not indulge in mis-selling of credit cards by providing incomplete or incorrect information to the customers,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The card-issuers shall also be liable for the acts of their agents.
enriched_requirements.object: the acts of their agents

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Repetitive complaints received in this regard against any employee / agent shall be taken
on record by the card-issuer and appropriate action shall be initiated against them
including blacklisting of such agents.
enriched_requirements.object: by the card-issuer and appropriate action shall be initiated against them including blacklisting of such agents

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A dedicated helpline and email-id shall be available
for the cardholders to raise complaints against any act of mis-selling or harassment by the
representative of the card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: cardholders to raise complaints against any act of mis-selling or harassment by the representative of the card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall formulate a comprehensive debit cards issuance policy with the approval of
their Boards and issue debit cards to their customers in accordance with this policy.
enriched_requirements.object: cards issuance policy with the approval of their Boards and issue debit cards to their customers in accordance with th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Debit cards shall only be issued to customers having Savings Bank / Current Accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: customers having Savings Bank / Current Accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The bank shall not issue debit cards to cash credit / loan accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: cash credit / loan accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall not force a customer to avail debit card facility and shall not link issuance of
debit card to availment of any other facility from the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: avail debit card facility and shall not link issuance of debit card to availment of any other facility from the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The banks shall undertake review of their operations / issue of debit cards on half-yearly
basis.
enriched_requirements.object: operations / issue of debit cards on half-yearly basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The review shall include, inter-alia, card usage analysis including cards not used
for long durations and the inherent risks therein.
enriched_requirements.object: analysis including cards not used for long durations and the inherent risks therein

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall formulate comprehensive policy / policies and procedures with the approval
of its Board covering, inter alia, the following aspects:
(1) Debit card issuance.
enriched_requirements.object: policies and procedures with the approval of its Board covering, inter alia, the following aspects: (1) Debit card is

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers may issue other form factors in place of / in addition to a plastic debit / credit
card such as wearables, after obtaining explicit consent from the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: in place of / in addition to a plastic debit / credit card such as wearables, after obtaining explicit consent from the custo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Form factors shall be subject to all the specific and general guidelines applicable to the
respective cards.
enriched_requirements.object: the specific and general guidelines applicable to the respective cards

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall provide options for disabling or blocking the form factor in line with the
instructions issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: or blocking the form factor in line with the instructions issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the conditions listed herein, the co-branding
arrangement for credit cards, debit cards and prepaid cards shall also be subject to the
specific conditions applicable to such cards.
enriched_requirements.object: the specific conditions applicable to such cards

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The co-branded card shall explicitly indicate that the card has been issued under a
cobranding arrangement.
enriched_requirements.object: card has been issued under a cobranding arrangement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The co-branding partner shall not advertise / market the
cobranded card as its own product.
enriched_requirements.object: cobranded card as its own product

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In all marketing / advertising material, the name of the
card-issuer shall be clearly shown.
The co-branded card shall prominently bear the branding of the card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: of the card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The co-branding arrangement shall be as per the Board approved policy of the card-
issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: Board approved policy of the card- issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall specifically address issues pertaining to various risks, including
reputation risk associated with such an arrangement and put in place suitable risk
mitigation measures.
enriched_requirements.object: to various risks, including reputation risk associated with such an arrangement and put in place suitable risk

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the information relating to revenue sharing between the
card-issuer and the co-branding partner entity shall be indicated to the cardholder and
also displayed on the website of the card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: cardholder and also displayed on the website of the card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall carry out due diligence in respect of the co-branding partner entity with
which they intend to enter into tie-up for issue of such cards to protect themselves against
the reputation risk they are exposed to in such an arrangement.
enriched_requirements.object: in respect of the co-branding partner entity with which they intend to enter into tie-up for issue of such cards to protect th

conditions: where the proposed co-branding partner is a financial entity
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure
that in cases where the proposed co-branding partner is a financial entity, it has obtained
necessary approvals from its regulator for entering into the co-branding arrangement.
enriched_requirements.object: where the proposed co-branding partner is a financial entity, it has obtained necessary approvals from its regulator for entering

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Card-issuers shall also be liable for the acts of the co-branding partner.
enriched_requirements.object: the acts of the co-branding partner

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuer
shall ensure adherence to Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Managing
<image>
Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Managing <image> Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to tim

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall
ensure that cash backs, discounts and other offers advertised by a co-branding partner
are delivered to the cardholder on time.
enriched_requirements.object: discounts and other offers advertised by a co-branding partner are delivered to the cardholder on time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall be liable for any delay or non-
delivery of the same to the cardholders.
enriched_requirements.object: delay or non- delivery of the same to the cardholders

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The role of the co-branding partner entity under the tie-up arrangement shall be limited to
marketing / distribution of the cards and providing access to the cardholder for the goods
/ services that are offered.
enriched_requirements.object: / distribution of the cards and providing access to the cardholder for the goods / services that are offered

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The co-branding partner (CBP) shall not have access to information relating to
transactions undertaken through the co-branded card irrespective of any other service
offered by them to the card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: relating to transactions undertaken through the co-branded card irrespective of any other service offered by them to the ca

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Post issuance of the card, the CBP shall not be
involved in any of the processes or the controls relating to the co-branded card except for
being the initial point of contact in case of grievances.
enriched_requirements.object: of the processes or the controls relating to the co-branded card except for being the initial point of contact in case of grievance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, for the purpose of
cardholder's convenience, card transaction related data may be drawn directly from the
card-issuer's system in an encrypted form and displayed in the CBP's platform with robust
security.
enriched_requirements.object: the card-issuer's system in an encrypted form and displayed in the CBP's platform with robust security

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The information displayed through the CBP's platform shall be visible only to the
cardholder and shall neither be accessed nor be stored by the CBP.
enriched_requirements.object: the cardholder and shall neither be accessed nor be stored by the CBP

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Prior approval shall not be required by the banks to become a co-branding partner of card-
issuers.
enriched_requirements.object: banks to become a co-branding partner of card- issuers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The role of the co-branding partner shall be as per the conditions stipulated under
paragraph 61 and 62.
enriched_requirements.object: conditions stipulated under paragraph 61 and 62

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall keep internal records to enable operations to be traced and errors to
be rectified (taking into account the law of limitation for the time barred cases) as
prescribed under Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Know Your Customer)
Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: enable operations to be traced and errors to be rectified (taking into account the law of limitation for the time barred case

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The cardholder shall be provided with a record of the transactions after he / she has
completed it, immediately in the form of receipt or another form such as the bank
statement / email / SMS.
enriched_requirements.object: record of the transactions after he / she has completed it, immediately in the form of receipt or another form such as the bank sta

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
With a view to reducing the instances of misuse of lost / stolen cards, it is recommended
to the card-issuers that they may consider issuing card with advanced features that may
evolve from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: advanced features that may evolve from time to time

conditions: In case card-issuers
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case card-issuers, at their discretion, decide to block / deactivate / suspend a debit or
credit card, it shall be ensured that a standard operating procedure is followed as
approved by their Board.
enriched_requirements.object: standard operating procedure is followed as approved by their Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, it shall also be ensured that blocking / deactivating /
suspending a card or withdrawal of benefits available on any card is immediately intimated
to the cardholder along with reasons thereof through electronic means (SMS, email, etc.)
and other available modes.
enriched_requirements.object: blocking / deactivating / suspending a card or withdrawal of benefits available on any card is immediately intimated to the cardh

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall block a lost card immediately on being informed by the cardholder and
formalities, if any, can follow within a reasonable period clearly defined in the Board
approved policy.
enriched_requirements.object: immediately on being informed by the cardholder and formalities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall provide to the cardholder the detailed procedure to report the loss, theft
or unauthorised use of card or PIN.
enriched_requirements.object: the detailed procedure to report the loss, theft or unauthorised use of card or PIN

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
They shall provide multiple channels such as a
dedicated helpline, dedicated number for SMS, dedicated e-mail-id, Interactive Voice
Response, clearly visible link on the website, internet banking and mobile-app or any other
mode for reporting an unauthorized transaction on 24 x 7 basis and allow the customer to
initiate the blocking of the card.
enriched_requirements.object: as a dedicated helpline, dedicated number for SMS, dedicated e-mail-id, Interactive Voice Response, clearly visible lin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The process for blocking the card, dedicated helpline as
<image>
well as the SMS numbers, shall be adequately publicized and included in the billing
statements.
enriched_requirements.object: included in the billing statements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall immediately send a confirmation to the cardholder subsequent to the
blocking of a card.
enriched_requirements.object: to the cardholder subsequent to the blocking of a card

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A card-issuer shall not dispatch a card to a customer unsolicited.
enriched_requirements.object: a customer unsolicited

conditions:
In case of renewal of an
existing card
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of renewal of an
existing card, the cardholder shall be provided an option to decline the same if he / she
wants to do so before dispatching the renewed card.
enriched_requirements.object: to decline the same if he / she wants to do so before dispatching the renewed card

conditions:
in case a card is blocked at
the request of the cardholder
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in case a card is blocked at
the request of the cardholder, replacement card in lieu of the blocked card shall be issued
with the explicit consent of the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: explicit consent of the cardholder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any discounts, cashbacks, reward points, loyalty points or any other benefits offered by
the card-issuer shall be provided in a transparent manner including source of such
benefits.
enriched_requirements.object: transparent manner including source of such benefits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The accounting process for the same shall be verifiable in the books of the card-
issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: books of the card- issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Detailed information regarding these benefits shall be displayed on the website of
the card-issuer and a copy of the same shall also be provided to the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: website of the card-issuer and a copy of the same shall also be provided to the cardholder

conditions:
in case a card-issuer or a card payment network provides an
insurance cover
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case a card-issuer or a card payment network provides an
insurance cover, complimentary or chargeable (with the consent of the cardholder), the
card-issuer shall ensure that the relevant nomination details are recorded by the
Insurance Company and the availability of insurance is included, along with other
information, in every statement.
enriched_requirements.object: nomination details are recorded by the Insurance Company and the availability of insurance is included, along with other info

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The information shall also include the details regarding
the insurance cover, name / address and telephone number of the Insurance Company
which will handle the claims relating to the insurance cover.
enriched_requirements.object: regarding the insurance cover, name / address and telephone number of the Insurance Company which will handle the claims rela

conditions:
In case of group insurance
policy
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of group insurance
policy, the contact details of the concerned officials of the card-issuer shall be provided in
the statements.
enriched_requirements.object: statements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The relationship between the card-issuer and the cardholder shall be contractual.

Card-
issuers shall make available to the cardholders in writing, a set of contractual terms and
conditions governing the issue and use of such cards.
enriched_requirements.object: cardholders in writing, a set of contractual terms and conditions governing the issue and use of such cards

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These terms shall be expressed
clearly and also maintain a fair balance between the interests of the parties concerned.
enriched_requirements.object: also maintain a fair balance between the interests of the parties concerned

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms and conditions for the issue and usage of a card shall be mentioned in clear
and simple language (preferably in English, Hindi and the local language) comprehensible
to the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: and simple language (preferably in English, Hindi and the local language) comprehensible to the cardholder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall not levy any charge that was not explicitly indicated to the cardholder
at the time of issue of the card and without getting his / her explicit consent.
enriched_requirements.object: was not explicitly indicated to the cardholder at the time of issue of the card and without getting his / her explicit consent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, this
shall not be applicable to charges like service taxes which may subsequently be levied by
the Government or any other statutory authority.
enriched_requirements.object: like service taxes which may subsequently be levied by the Government or any other statutory authority

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The details of all the charges associated
with cards shall be displayed on the card-issuer's website.
enriched_requirements.object: card-issuer's website

conditions: if any charged on specific transactions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The convenience fee, if any charged on specific transactions, shall be indicated to the
cardholder in a transparent manner, prior to the transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: cardholder in a transparent manner, prior to the transaction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms shall clearly specify the time-period for reversal of unsuccessful / failed
transactions and the compensation payable for failure to meet the specified timeline.
enriched_requirements.object: for reversal of unsuccessful / failed transactions and the compensation payable for failure to meet the specified time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms may be altered by the card-issuer, but 30 days' notice of the change shall be
given to the cardholder to enable him / her to withdraw if he / she so chooses.
enriched_requirements.object: cardholder to enable him / her to withdraw if he / she so chooses

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The change in terms shall be
notified to the cardholder through all the communication channels available.
enriched_requirements.object: cardholder through all the communication channels available

conditions: if access is gained to such a record
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms shall put the cardholder under an obligation to take all appropriate steps to
keep the card safe and not to record the PIN or code, in any form that would be intelligible
or otherwise accessible to any third party if access is gained to such a record, either
honestly or dishonestly.
enriched_requirements.object: an obligation to take all appropriate steps to keep the card safe and not to record the PIN or code, in any form that would b

conditions:
when issuing PINs or
codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's PIN or code to
anyone
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms shall specify that the card-issuer shall exercise care when issuing PINs or
codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's PIN or code to
anyone, except to the cardholder.
enriched_requirements.object: shall exercise care when issuing PINs or codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's PIN or code to anyone

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The issue of cards as a payment mechanism shall also be subject to relevant instructions
on cash withdrawal, issue of international card, security issues and risk mitigation
measures, card-to-card fund transfers, merchant discount rates structure, failed ATM
transactions, etc, issued by the Department of Payment and Settlement Systems,
Reserve Bank of India under the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007, and the
<image>
Foreign Exchange Department, Reserve Bank of India under Foreign Exchange
Management Act, 1999, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: relevant instructions on cash withdrawal, issue of international card, security issues and risk mitigation measures, card-to-card f

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall put in place a Grievance Redressal Mechanism within the card issuing
entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media.
enriched_requirements.object: Grievance Redressal Mechanism within the card issuing entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The name, direct
contact number, email-id and postal address of the designated grievance redressal officer
of the card-issuer shall be mentioned on the credit card bills and account statements.
enriched_requirements.object: credit card bills and account statements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
designated officer shall ensure that grievances of cardholders are redressed promptly
without any delay.
enriched_requirements.object: cardholders are redressed promptly without any delay

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Specific timelines may be stipulated in the Board approved policy for
issuance of cards, redressal of grievances and compensation framework.
enriched_requirements.object: Board approved policy for issuance of cards, redressal of grievances and compensation framework

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The grievance
redressal procedure and the Board approved policy shall be displayed on the website of
the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the homepage.
enriched_requirements.object: website of the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the homepage

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure that their call centre staff are trained adequately to competently
handle and escalate, a complaint, if necessary.
enriched_requirements.object: centre staff are trained adequately to competently handle and escalate, a complaint

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Grievance Redressal process shall
have a provision for automatic escalation of unresolved complaints from a call center /
base level to higher authorities.
enriched_requirements.object: automatic escalation of unresolved complaints from a call center / base level to higher authorities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be a system of acknowledging customers'
complaints for follow up, such as complaint number / docket number, even if the
complaints are received over phone.
enriched_requirements.object: acknowledging customers' complaints for follow up, such as complaint number / docket number, even if the complaints are received over p

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall be liable to compensate the complainant for the loss of his / her time,
expenses, financial loss as well as for the harassment and mental anguish suffered by
him / her for the fault of the card-issuer and where the grievance has not been redressed
in time.
enriched_requirements.object: the complainant for the loss of his / her time, expenses, financial loss as well as for the harassment and mental anguish suff

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For redressal of his / her grievance, the customer must first approach the
concerned card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall not reveal any information relating to customers obtained at the time of
opening the account or issuing the card to any other person or organization without
obtaining their explicit consent, with regard to the purpose/s for which the information will
be used and the organizations with whom the information will be shared.
enriched_requirements.object: to customers obtained at the time of opening the account or issuing the card to any other person or organization witho

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers
shall ensure strict compliance to the extant legal framework on data protection.
enriched_requirements.object: the extant legal framework on data protection

conditions:
in case where the customers give explicit consent for sharing the information provided by
them with other agencies
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
in case where the customers give explicit consent for sharing the information provided by
them with other agencies, card-issuers shall clearly state and explain to the customer the
full meaning / implications of the disclosure clause.
enriched_requirements.object: to the customer the full meaning / implications of the disclosure clause

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The information sought from
customers shall not be of such nature which will violate the provisions of law relating to
maintenance of secrecy in the transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: which will violate the provisions of law relating to maintenance of secrecy in the transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuers shall be solely responsible
for the correctness or otherwise of the data provided for the purpose.
enriched_requirements.object: the correctness or otherwise of the data provided for the purpose

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Under a co-branding arrangement, the co-branding entity shall not be permitted to access
any details of customer's accounts that may violate the card-issuer's secrecy obligations.
enriched_requirements.object: any details of customer's accounts that may violate the card-issuer's secrecy obligations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case, the co-branding arrangement is
between two banks, the card issuing bank shall ensure compliance with the relevant
instructions.
enriched_requirements.object: relevant instructions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure adherence to the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
the card-issuers shall not share card data (including transaction data) of the cardholders
with the outsourcing partners unless sharing of such data is essential to discharge the
functions assigned to the latter.
enriched_requirements.object: transaction data) of the cardholders with the outsourcing partners unless sharing of such data is essential to discharge th

conditions: In case of sharing of any data as stated above
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of sharing of any data as stated above, explicit
consent from the cardholder shall be obtained.

It shall also be ensured that the storage
and the ownership of card data remains with the card-issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: the storage and the ownership of card data remains with the card-issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions / Directions on KYC / AML / CFT issued by RBI from time to time, shall
be strictly adhered to in respect of all cards issued, including co-branded cards.
enriched_requirements.object: in respect of all cards issued, including co-branded cards

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Card-issuers shall provide to the cardholder the term-sheet containing the MITC.
enriched_requirements.object: the term-sheet containing the MITC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
document should contain the following details:
(1) Fees and Charges
enriched_requirements.object: (1) Fees and Charges

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Items to be disclosed in stages:
(1) During marketing - Item no: 91(1)
(2) At application - Key fact statement containing items from 91(1) to (3) and any additional
information that the customer may desire.
(i) The font size of MITC shall be minimum Arial-12

(ii) The normal terms and conditions communicated by the card-issuer to the
cardholder at different stages shall continue as hitherto.

The Directions, instructions and guidelines
already repealed shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under
these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced
and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions,
instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to remove
any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these Directions, the
RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect of any matter
covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the RBI
shall be final and binding.
